---
title: "Unsupervised density-based method for analyzing ion mobility in crystalline solid-state electrolytes"
author: ["Henry A. Cortés", "Mauricio Rincón Bonilla", "Elena Akhmatskaya"]
date: 2025-06-16
publication: "npj Computational Materials, **11**, 368 (2025)."
categories: ["SSBs"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41524-025-01861-6
url_preprint:
journ: "npj Computational Materials"
issue: 11
page: 368
year: 2025
image: featured.png
pub_number: 17
---
